details.message: reports/board/ directory is not tracked in git (missing from HEAD tree). All other expected top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) are present.

reports/board/ not tracked in git. memory_bank/ has key docs (systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md, report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md). .cursor/automations/ has README.md + 5 automation specs. reports/audit/ exists and is tracked.

Active moltbot/ directory found with code files (sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py).
